commands.author: zaidazmi

target.title: feat(doctor): add doctor --explain diagnostics
target.body:
## Summary

- Adds `openclaw doctor --explain` for plain-English structured doctor findings.
- Keeps explain mode read-only: no prompts, no config/state writes, no repair hook calls.
- Keeps default `openclaw doctor`, `doctor --fix`, and `doctor --lint --json` behavior unchanged.
- Keeps `--only`/`--skip` scoped to read-only `--lint` and `--explain`; the earlier per-check repair selector was removed from this PR and should be a follow-up only if maintainers explicitly approve that public CLI contract.

Closes #94241

## Real behavior proof (required for external PRs)

- Behavior addressed: Adds read-only plain-English explain output for structured doctor findings without adding a new mutating repair command or changing default doctor/lint/fix behavior.
- Real environment tested: macOS local checkout, branch `codex/doctor-explain`, commit `5cc49a92`, Node `v23.6.1`, isolated `.artifacts/doctor-explain-proof` `HOME`, `OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR`, and `OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH`.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch:
  ```sh
  rm -rf .artifacts/doctor-explain-proof
  mkdir -p .artifacts/doctor-explain-proof/home
  HOME="$PWD/.artifacts/doctor-explain-proof/home" \
    OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR="$PWD/.artifacts/doctor-explain-proof/state" \
    OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH="$PWD/.artifacts/doctor-explain-proof/openclaw.json" \
    node scripts/run-node.mjs doctor --explain --only core/doctor/gateway-config \
    > .artifacts/doctor-explain-proof/output.txt 2>&1
  find .artifacts/doctor-explain-proof -maxdepth 2 -type f -print | sort
  ```
- Evidence after fix:
  ```text
  doctor --explain: ran 1 check(s), 1 finding(s)

  Gateway config [warning]
    Check: core/doctor/gateway-config
    What happened: Gateway setup is incomplete.
    Why it matters: OpenClaw cannot reliably start or find the Gateway until this is configured.
    Try this: Run `openclaw configure` and set Gateway mode (local/remote), or `openclaw config set gateway.mode local`.
    Automatic repair: This report is read-only. Run openclaw doctor --fix to apply supported repairs.
    Details:
    - gateway.mode: gateway.mode is unset; gateway start will be blocked.

  files_after_probe:
  .artifacts/doctor-explain-proof/output.txt
  ```
- Observed result after fix: command exited `1` because the selected warning-level finding was present; explain output rendered the new plain-English sections; no `openclaw.json` was written in the isolated proof directory.
- What was not tested: cross-platform/package install smoke, broad `pnpm check:changed`, and full CI locally. Interactive per-check repair is intentionally not tested here because this PR no longer adds an explain prompt or repair selector behavior.

## Verification

- `pnpm docs:list`
- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=2 NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 node --no-maglev node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run src/cli/program/register.maintenance.test.ts src/commands/doctor-lint.test.ts` (22 tests passed)
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/cli/program/register.maintenance.ts src/cli/program/register.maintenance.test.ts src/commands/doctor-lint.ts src/commands/doctor-lint.test.ts src/commands/doctor-explain.ts src/flows/health-checks.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.ts docs/cli/doctor.md docs/gateway/doctor.md`
- `pnpm check:docs`
- `git diff --check`
- `rg "repairableCheckIds|runDoctorSelectedRepairCli|explainRepairPromptLabel|confirmRepairCheck" src docs` (no matches)
- real CLI proof above with isolated OpenClaw home/config/state

## Risk checklist

Did user-visible behavior change? Yes, additive CLI output behind `--explain`.

Did config, environment, migration, or repair behavior change? No. This update removes the new per-check repair path from the PR; explain mode is read-only, and existing `doctor --fix` remains the only repair posture touched by users.

Did security, auth, secrets, network, or tool execution behavior change? No new secret, network, or tool execution behavior. Existing `--allow-exec` gating is only passed through to read-only structured checks.

Compatibility posture: conservative additive flag, no default output change, no new mutating command path, no config/default surface, no migration behavior, and docs now match the code.

## Current review state

AI-assisted PR. I understand the code changes and verified the behavior above. Latest update specifically addresses the compatibility-risk feedback by splitting out the per-check repair selector and leaving it for a future issue/PR only after maintainer approval.
